EXPERIENCE

Career path

2022 — 2025
Senior Product Manager
TechCorp · Moscow / Remote

Led end-to-end development of B2B SaaS platform from 0 to 50k MAU. Cross-functional team of 12. Ran 40+ customer interviews, defined MVP, secured €2.1M Series A. Reduced time-to-value from 21 to 4 days.

VALUE PROPOSITION

Why work with me

Systems thinking

I design products as interconnected systems, not isolated features.

Cross-functional leadership

I align engineers, designers, and stakeholders without friction.

Data-driven decisions

Intuition backed by metrics. I run structured experiments.

Clear communication

Complex ideas in plain language. Specs that get read.

Fast onboarding

I map context quickly and become effective from week one.

Ownership mindset

Accountability, initiative, and care for outcomes.

Strategic vision

I connect daily decisions to long-term positioning.

User empathy

200+ user interviews. Pain is never abstract to me.

FAQ

Common questions

Are you open to relocation or full remote?+
Yes to both. I've worked fully remote for 3+ years across distributed international teams.
What domains have you worked in?+
B2B SaaS, fintech, media, and internal tooling. I adapt quickly to new domains.
What team size have you managed?+
Up to 12 people directly. Also IC PM in larger orgs with 40+ person teams.
Do you do consulting or freelance projects?+
Selectively yes — for product audits, 0-to-1 launches, or team coaching.
What's your approach to prioritization?+
Context-dependent. RICE or ICE for discovery, opportunity scoring for mature products.
Are you available right now?+
Open to conversations. Best via Telegram or LinkedIn — usually within 24 hours.

Let's connect

Open to full-time roles, consulting, and interesting conversations about product.
